top_signals.title: Canadian Stocks Enjoy Broad Gains After New Pipeline Proposal
top_signals.summary: Canada’s stocks benchmark climbed Friday morning after Prime Minister Mark Carney unveiled a new pipeline project to the country’s West Coast.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
